/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/milestone1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/doubly_linked_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/generate_output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/milestone1.dir/dll_node.cpp.o -o milestone1
